notes: SHIP v1.14.280 - two independent jobs in one commit (per HANDOFF-ASK-PLATE-280, files 69.zip). PART 1 (takes the stamp) = REMOVE THE ASK PLATE + fix the violet token: CSS only. The .279 Ask tile put 184x256 portrait art in a 56x56 square plate -> bust overflowed 3px top/bottom. Owner ruling: remove the plate. #pg-cmd .apill .av is now a BARE SIZING BOX (56x72, display:grid, place-items:center - no bg/border/radius/inset glow); #pg-cmd .apill .av img goes height 62->72 + drop-shadow glow so violet reads around the bust silhouette (like the LENS ghost hero). Rendered ~52x72, inside the 56px box. DEVIATION (found in render-verify, folded in, reported): the .279 AND .280 specs both used var(--vio), but --vio is a MOCK/boot token - it is ONLY defined under #boot and #forge3d-sheet, NOT in #pg-cmd (:root uses --violet #9b59ff, not --vio). So the .279 Ask tile's violet border + inset glow NEVER RENDERED (color-mix(var(--vio)..) was invalid -> dropped), and Part 1's new drop-shadow would have been a no-op too (glow-less bust = Part 1 fails its purpose). Fix: swapped var(--vio)->var(--violet) in the three ask-tile rules I own (#pg-cmd .apill border+box-shadow, #pg-cmd .apill .av img drop-shadow, #pg-cmd .apill .ey label). Verified live real-layout: apill border now #9b59ff/0.45 + inset glow /0.3; bust drop-shadow #9b59ff/0.55; ey label #9b59ff; .av bg/border gone (plate removed); img decoded natW=184. This RESTORES the owner-approved mock look (mock defined --vio on :root so it showed violet; live never did). Other var(--vio) consumers (rack-template bands :6608, forge crumbs/gradients, platform chips) left ALONE - pre-existing, out of this ship's scope. PART 2 (NO stamp - rides Part 1's commit) = GITHUB PAGES LINK-PREVIEW CARD swap: manifest-og-v2.png added at repo ROOT (1200x630 PNG, 322879 bytes; photoreal composite of cc-ghost.webp+cc-wordmark.png on #020408 violet-glow field, replacing the flat og.svg-derived vector ghost); og:image (:29) + twitter:image (:32) URLs repointed manifest-og.png -> manifest-og-v2.png. NEW FILENAME IS THE CACHE-BUST (per-URL unfurl caches). manifest-og.png LEFT (existing Slack unfurls point at it); og:image:width/height (:30/:31) untouched; NOT in sw.js (not an app asset); og.svg LEFT but now STALE as the card source (flag only). Gates: node --check 4/0; sw.js OK; CSS braces 3912/3912 balanced; CRLF 0 bare LF; three-stamp .279->.280. RULES RECORDED: (Part 1) Ask slot has NO plate as of .280 - future art carries its own glow, keyed with clean alpha (drop-shadow reads alpha; a fringe/matte haloes). MOCK-TOKEN TRAP: specs use --vio/--mag (mock/boot tokens); the live app uses --violet/--magenta - verify token NAMES against :root before shipping color-mix. (Part 2) social-card assets versioned by FILENAME not the three-stamp; next is -v3; if rebuilt it's a raster composite of cc-ghost.webp+cc-wordmark.png, not an SVG. John iPhone gate (Part 1): Ask tile bust with NO purple box; violet GLOW follows the bust shape (now actually renders); tile has a violet border/glow (was missing in .279 - the --vio bug); tap Ask -> VA sheet on intent; Ask/RESERVED/RESERVED equal at 96px; desktop >=980 askrow still on the 1080 column. Part 2 owner check: post the dct-ios.html link in a FRESH Slack message, confirm the new photoreal ghost unfurl (Pages needs ~1 min).
